title: Spiritual Letters: The Art of Mr.Paradox Paradise
overview: The film is a story about the deep connection of the life and art of the artist. It takes you on a journey through Berlin like you have never seen before. Take a deep dive behind the scenes of the famous red and blue graffiti letterings that cover the heart of  the city and tune into the connection between art, letters and spirituality.
